channel.title: TWCERT/CC — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by TWCERT/CC (twcert).

item.title: CVE-2026-10075 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Interinfo｜DreamMaker - Path Traversal
item.description: DreamMaker developed by Interinfo has a Path Traversal vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to read file names under arbitrary path by exploiting an Absolute Path Traversal vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-10074 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Interinfo｜DreamMaker - Arbitrary File Read
item.description: DreamMaker developed by Interinfo has an Arbitrary File Read vulnerability, allowing privileged local attackers to exploit Relative Path Traversal to download arbitrary system files.

item.title: CVE-2026-10073 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Interinfo｜DreamMaker - Arbitrary File Read
item.description: DreamMaker developed by Interinfo has an Arbitrary File Read vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated local attackers to exploit Relative Path Traversal to download arbitrary system files.

item.title: CVE-2026-10072 · 8.6 HIGH — Interinfo｜DreamMaker - Arbitrary File Upload
item.description: DreamMaker developed by Interinfo has an Arbitrary File Upload vulnerability, allowing privileged remote attackers to upload and execute web shell backdoors, thereby enabling arbitrary code execution on the server.

item.title: CVE-2026-10071 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Interinfo｜DreamMaker - Arbitrary File Upload
item.description: DreamMaker developed by Interinfo has an Arbitrary File Upload vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to upload and execute web shell backdoors, thereby enabling arbitrary code execution on the server.

item.title: CVE-2026-10058 · 4.8 MEDIUM — ITP Technology｜ITS Intelligent SCADA System - Stored Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: ITS Intelligent SCADA System developed by ITP Technology has a Stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability, allowing privileged remote attackers to inject persistent JavaScript codes that are executed in users' browsers upon page load.

item.title: CVE-2026-10057 · 4.8 MEDIUM — ITP Technology｜ITS Intelligent SCADA System - Stored Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: ITS Intelligent SCADA System developed by ITP Technology has a Stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability, allowing privileged remote attackers to inject persistent JavaScript codes that are executed in users' browsers upon page load.

item.title: CVE-2026-9493 · 7.1 HIGH — BankPro E-Service Technology｜Service Center - Insecure Direct Object Reference
item.description: Service Center developed by BankPro E-Service Technology has an Insecure Direct Object Reference vulnerability, allowing authenticated remote attackers to modify the parameter of a specific query function to access other users' EC order details.

item.title: CVE-2026-9003 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — TONNET｜E-LAN Hybrid Recording System - SQL Injection
item.description: E-LAN Hybrid Recording System developed by TONNET has a SQL Injection vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to inject arbitrary SQL commands to read database contents.

item.title: CVE-2026-7491 · 8.6 HIGH — Zyosoft｜School App - Insecure Direct Object Reference
item.description: School App developed by Zyosoft has an Insecure Direct Object Reference vulnerability, allowing authenticated remote attackers to modify a specific parameter to read and modify other users' data.

item.title: CVE-2026-7490 · 8.6 HIGH — Sunnet｜CTMS and CPAS - Arbitrary File Upload
item.description: CTMS and CPAS developed by Sunnet has an Arbitrary File Upload vulnerability, allowing privileged remote attackers to upload and execute web shell backdoors, thereby enabling arbitrary code execution on the server.

item.title: CVE-2026-7489 · 8.8 HIGH — Sunnet｜CTMS - SQL Injection
item.description: CTMS developed by Sunnet has a SQL Injection vulnerability, allowing authenticated remote attackers to inject arbitrary SQL commands to read, modify, and delete database contents.

item.title: CVE-2026-7280 · 8.4 HIGH — eMPIA Technology｜AVACAST - Unquoted Service Path
item.description: AVACAST developed by eMPIA Technology has a Unquoted Service Path vulnerability, allowing privileged local attackers to place a malicious executable file in a specific directory, resulting in arbitrary code execution with system privileges when the A…

item.title: CVE-2026-7279 · 8.5 HIGH — eMPIA Technology｜AVACAST - DLL Hijacking
item.description: AVACAST developed by eMPIA Technology, has a DLL Hijacking vulnerability, allowing authenticated local attackers to place a malicious DLL in a specific directory, resulting in arbitrary code execution with system privileges when the system loads the…

item.title: CVE-2026-6947 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — D-Link｜DWM-222W USB Wi-Fi Adapter - Brute-Force Protection Bypass
item.description: DWM-222W USB Wi-Fi Adapter developed by D-Link has a Brute-Force Protection Bypass vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated adjacent network attackers to bypass login attempt limits to perform brute-force attacks to gain control over the device.

item.title: CVE-2026-6887 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — BorG Technology Corporation｜Borg SPM 2007 - SQL Injection
item.description: Borg SPM 2007 (Sales Ended in 2008) developed by BorG Technology Corporation has a SQL Injection vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to inject arbitrary SQL commands to read, modify, and delete database contents.

item.title: CVE-2026-6886 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — BorG Technology Corporation｜Borg SPM 2007 - Authentication Bypass
item.description: Borg SPM 2007 (Sales Ended in 2008) developed by BorG Technology Corporation has a Authentication Bypass vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to log into the system as any user.

item.title: CVE-2026-6885 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — BorG Technology Corporation｜Borg SPM 2007 - Arbitrary File Upload
item.description: Borg SPM 2007 (Sales Ended in 2008) developed by BorG Technology Corporation has an Arbitrary File Upload vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to upload and execute web shell backdoors, thereby enabling arbitrary code execution on…

item.title: CVE-2026-6835 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — aEnrich｜a+HCM - Arbitrary File Upload
item.description: The a+HCM developed by aEnrich has an Arbitrary File Upload vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to upload arbitrary files to any path, including HTML documents, which may result in a XSS-like effect.

item.title: CVE-2026-6834 · 7.1 HIGH — aEnrich｜a+HRD - Missing Authorization
item.description: The a+HRD developed by aEnrich has a Missing Authorization vulnerability, allowing authenticated remote attackers to arbitrarily read database contents through a specific API method.

item.title: CVE-2026-6833 · 7.1 HIGH — aEnrich｜a+HRD - SQL Injection
item.description: The a+HRD developed by aEnrich has a SQL Injection vulnerability, allowing authenticated remote attackers to inject arbitrary SQL commands to read database contents.

item.title: CVE-2026-5965 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — NewSoft｜NewSoftOA - OS Command Injection
item.description: NewSoftOA developed by NewSoft has an OS Command Injection vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated local attackers to inject arbitrary OS commands and execute them on the server.

item.title: CVE-2026-5967 · 8.8 HIGH — TeamT5｜ThreatSonar Anti-Ransomware - Privilege Escalation
item.description: ThreatSonar Anti-Ransomware developed by TeamT5 has an Privilege Escalation vulnerability. Authenticated remote attackers with shell access can inject OS commands and execute them with root privileges.

item.title: CVE-2026-5966 · 8.1 HIGH — TeamT5｜ThreatSonar Anti-Ransomware - Arbitrary File Deletion
item.description: ThreatSonar Anti-Ransomware developed by TeamT5 has an Arbitrary File Deletion vulnerability. Authenticated remote attackers with web access can exploit Path Traversal to delete arbitrary files on the system.

item.title: CVE-2026-5964 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Digiwin｜EasyFlow .NET - SQL Injection
item.description: EasyFlow .NET developed by Digiwin has a SQL Injection vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to inject arbitrary SQL commands to read, modify, and delete database contents.

item.title: CVE-2026-5963 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Digiwin｜EasyFlow .NET - SQL Injection
item.description: EasyFlow .NET developed by Digiwin has a SQL Injection vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to inject arbitrary SQL commands to read, modify, and delete database contents.

item.title: CVE-2026-6351 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Openfind｜MailGates/MailAudit - CRLF Injection
item.description: MailGates/MailAudit developed by Openfind has a CRLF Injection vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to exploit this vulnerability to read system files.

item.title: CVE-2026-6350 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Openfind｜MailGates/MailAudit - Stack-based Buffer Overflow
item.description: MailGates/MailAudit developed by Openfind has a Stack-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to control the program's execution flow and execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2026-6349 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — HGiga｜iSherlock - OS Command Injection
item.description: The iSherlock developed by HGiga has an OS Command Injection vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated local attackers to inject arbitrary OS commands and execute them on the server.

item.title: CVE-2026-6348 · 9.3 CRITICAL — Simopro Technology｜WinMatrix - Missing Authentication
item.description: WinMatrix agent developed by Simopro Technology has a Missing Authentication vulnerability, allowing authenticated local attackers to execute arbitrary code with SYSTEM privileges on the local machine as well as on all hosts within the environment wh…

item.title: CVE-2026-4416 · 8.5 HIGH — GIGABYTE｜Performance Library - Insecure Deserialization
item.description: The Performance Library component of Gigabyte Control Center has an Insecure Deserialization vulnerability. Authenticated local attackers can send a malicious serialized payload to the EasyTune Engine service, resulting in privilege escalation.

item.title: CVE-2026-4415 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GIGABYTE｜Gigabyte Control Center - Arbitrary File Write
item.description: Gigabyte Control Center developed by GIGABYTE has an Arbitrary File Write vulnerability. When the pairing feature is enabled, unauthenticated remote attackers can write arbitrary files to any location on the underlying operating system, leading to ar…

item.title: CVE-2026-4640 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Galaxy Software Services｜Vitals ESP - Missing Authentication
item.description: Vitals ESP developed by Galaxy Software Services has a Missing Authentication vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to execute certain functions to obtain sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-4639 · 8.8 HIGH — Galaxy Software Services｜Vitals ESP - Incorrect Authorization
item.description: Vitals ESP developed by Galaxy Software Services has a Incorrect Authorization vulnerability, allowing authenticated remote attackers to perform certain administrative functions, thereby escalating privileges.

item.title: CVE-2026-4312 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — DrangSoft｜GCB/FCB Audit Software - Missing Authentication
item.description: GCB/FCB Audit Software developed by DrangSoft has a Missing Authentication vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to directly access certain APIs to create a new administrative account.

item.title: CVE-2026-3826 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WellChoose｜IFTOP - Local File Inclusion
item.description: IFTOP developed by WellChoose has a Local File Inclusion vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on the server.

item.title: CVE-2026-3825 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WellChoose｜IFTOP - Reflected Cross-site Scripting
item.description: IFTOP developed by WellChoose has a Reflected Cross-site Scripting vulnerability, allowing authenticated remote attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript codes in user's browser through phishing attacks.

item.title: CVE-2026-3824 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WellChoose｜IFTOP - Open redirect
item.description: IFTOP developed by WellChoose has an Open redirect vulnerability, allowing authenticated remote attackers to craft a URL that tricks users into visiting malicious website.

item.title: CVE-2026-3823 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Atop Technologies｜EHG2408 series switch - Stack-based Buffer Overflow
item.description: EHG2408 series switch developed by Atop Technologies has a Stack-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to control the program's execution flow and execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2026-3822 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Taipower｜Taipower APP(Android) - Improper Certificate Validation
item.description: Taipower APP for Andorid developed by Taipower has an Improper Certificate Validation vulnerability. When establishing an HTTPS connection with the server, the application fails to verify the server-side TLS/SSL certificate. This flaw allows an unaut…

item.title: CVE-2026-3422 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — e-Excellence｜U-Office Force - Insecure Deserialization
item.description: U-Office Force developed by e-Excellence has a Insecure Deserialization vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on the server by sending maliciously crafted serialized content.

item.title: CVE-2026-3000 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Changing｜IDExpert Windows Logon Agent - Remote Code Execution
item.description: IDExpert Windows Logon Agent developed by Changing has a Remote Code Execution vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to force the system to download arbitrary DLL files from a remote source and execute them.

item.title: CVE-2026-2999 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Changing｜IDExpert Windows Logon Agent - Remote Code Execution
item.description: IDExpert Windows Logon Agent developed by Changing has a Remote Code Execution vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to force the system to download arbitrary executable files from a remote source and execute them.

item.title: CVE-2026-2998 · 8.5 HIGH — eAI Technologies｜ERP - DLL Hijacking
item.description: ERP developed by eAI Technologies has a DLL Hijacking vulnerability, allowing authenticated local attackers to place a crafted DLL file in the same directory as the program, thereby executing arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2026-2997 · 6.5 MEDIUM — WisdomGarden｜Tronclass - Insecure Direct Object Reference
item.description: Tronclass developed by WisdomGarden has a Insecure Direct Object Reference vulnerability. After obtaining a course ID, authenticated remote attackers to modify a specific parameter to obtain a course invitation code, thereby joining any course.

item.title: CVE-2026-2099 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Flowring｜AgentFlow - Stored Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: AgentFlow developed by Flowring has a Stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability, allowing authenticated remote attackers to inject persistent JavaScript codes that are executed in users' browsers upon page load.

item.title: CVE-2026-2098 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Flowring｜AgentFlow - Reflected Cross-site Scripting
item.description: AgentFlow developed by Flowring has a Reflected Cross-site Scripting vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript codes in user's browser through phishing attacks.

item.title: CVE-2026-2097 · 8.8 HIGH — Flowring｜Agentflow - Arbitrary File Upload
item.description: Agentflow developed by Flowring has an Arbitrary File Upload vulnerability, allowing authenticated remote attackers to upload and execute web shell backdoors, thereby enabling arbitrary code execution on the server.

item.title: CVE-2026-2096 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Flowring｜Agentflow - Missing Authenticaton
item.description: Agentflow developed by Flowring has a Missing Authentication vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to read, modify, and delete database contents by using a specific functionality.

item.title: CVE-2026-2095 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Flowring｜Agentflow - Authentication Bypass
item.description: Agentflow developed by Flowring has an Authentication Bypass vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to exploit a specific functionality to obtain arbitrary user authentication token and log into the system as any user.
